title: No Bobber Overlay
description: Remove the fishing bobber / hook from your screen, but nowhere else. Doesn't require any mods.
body:
## Showcase
This is with the pack on and the bobber out in the world. You can still see the bobber, just as long as it's not in your face.
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDogr5B6/images/6efc9ef654603d4fc3378e03858740fa47933a3a.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDogr5B6/images/6efc9ef654603d4fc3378e03858740fa47933a3a.png)
This is also with the pack on, but this time the bobber is in your face. But it's actually hidden, meaning you can still pvp and see the rest of the world around you!
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDogr5B6/images/9376e3b1fe3d1fe222ff670da60f9fe3f78493a1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDogr5B6/images/9376e3b1fe3d1fe222ff670da60f9fe3f78493a1.png)

## Description
Whenever you get hooked with a fishing rod, you can see a very obtrusive overlay of a bobber on your screen. Up until now, every pack that fixed this removed the bobber texture entirely. This pack meets halfway by removing the bobber ONLY if it's very very close to your screen (like in your face). Now, you can see the bobber while fishing but not when people hook you. This pack is very useful for pvp gamemodes.

## Support
If you would like to suggest something, report an issue, or vote on future texture packs then [join my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV).

https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
